document_metadata.bylaw_name: Land Use By-law for Eastern Passage/Cow Bay

provisions.text: UR USES PERMITTED No development permit shall be issued in any UR (Urban Reserve) Zone except for the following: Single unit dwellings, on existing lots provided that a private on -site sewage disposal system and well are provided on the lot Shared housing use with 10 or fewer bedrooms in conjunction with a permitted dwelling unit (RC-Aug 9/22;E-Sep 15/22) Passive recreation uses Uses accessory to the foregoing uses

UR ZONE REQUIREMENTS In any UR Zone, no development permit shall be issued except in conformity with the following: Minimum Front or Flankage Yard: 9.1m Minimum Side Yard: 2.5m Minimum Rear Yard: 2.5m Maximum Lot Coverage: 35% Maximum Height of Main Building: 11m
